positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial map featuring a central glowing crescent moon intertwined with geometric constellations and abstract, bioluminescent cosmic dust. The color palette should utilize deep indigo, electric teal, warm gold, and luminous pearl white. The composition must be highly symmetrical and clean, designed as a repeating, single-color silhouette decal against a solid background. Include stylized astrological symbols, abstract galaxy swirls, and subtle, crystalline mountain peaks emerging from the void. Minimalist yet richly detailed, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Vector art style, high contrast, clean lines, graphic novel aesthetic, flat design, 4k, clean vector illustration.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, copyrighted, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photo, realistic, signature, bokeh
